description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, clean lines, and a minimalist aesthetic. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with a spacious patio area and a swimming pool adjacent to the main building. Several cars are parked in front, and the property is surrounded by a variety of trees and shrubs, including palms and flowering plants. The bungalow has two visible stories, with balconies and terraces on the upper level. The landscaping is carefully arranged, enhancing the contemporary and open feel of the residence.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a pool, and landscaped surroundings. The structure is light gray and white, with two stories and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three parked cars, large windows, and the pool area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the pool, and the arrangement of trees and plants in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, upper balconies, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the pool, patio, and the landscaped garden, as well as the building's side elevation.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
